title: OSF Source descriptor — next/ (AC-1 coverage: sources alongside profiles) — v2.0
description: Permissive AJV meta-schema for files under next/sources/** (postgresql/, rest/, static/). AC-1 requires the next/ validation pipeline to cover sources AND sync (not just profiles). This schema is deliberately CONSERVATIVE/PERMISSIVE: 'additionalProperties': true everywhere it is not certain, so it adds COVERAGE without imposing new constraints that would false-fail the existing, varied source files (DB pollers with columnMappings/edges, REST pollers with response/polling, and the static/anchor source with records[]/relationships[]/profileRefs[]). It pins only the small, universally-present spine: sourceId, version, sourceType, syncType, the SHAPE of columnMappings/edges WHEN present — and, since 2026-07-15, the location block: REQUIRED on opcua/mtconnect sources, vocabulary-pinned wherever present. History: sgm-006 shipped {site, area: 'Molding', line: 'LineA'} — no enterprise, no type, different casing than every sister — and under 7-segment Class-A UNS subjects (factory.<site>.<area>.<line>.<machine>...) landed in a differently-spelled area/line than sgm-001/004/005, silently, because nothing validated the block. Deeper, per-sourceType semantics (connection shapes, valueMap, anchor records) are reviewed, not schema-pinned — same 'loose facet' pattern as isa95/constraints in the profile schemas. The id-property check (exactly one isId per source) is enforced separately where needed, not here.

_example.description: Optional meta flag: example/demo fixture, not canonical.

location.description: Physical placement of the machine in the UNS topology — every segment here becomes a literal subject token (factory.<site>.<area>.<line>.<machine>...). PINNED 2026-07-15 (root cause of the sgm-006 drift): when a source carries 'location', enterprise/site/area/line are REQUIRED and must be lowercase kebab-case — the vocabulary every green source already uses (enterprise 'factory', site 'werk1', area 'cnc'|'sgm', line 'line-a'|'line-mtc'). 'type' (machine class, e.g. 'CNC'/'SGM') is optional but UPPERCASE when present. additionalProperties: false — a stray mis-cased key ('Area', 'Line') must fail loudly, not ride along silently next to the required ones.

columnMappings.description: Column/field -> SM attribute projection. Each entry maps a source 'column' (or a literal 'const', or a template) onto an 'smAttribute'. Loosely typed: at least one of column/const must be present, smAttribute is required; optional isId/valueMap. additionalProperties allowed for forward-compat (e.g. template/transform).

edges.description: KG edges projected from this source (kg-builder / it-edge canonical KG projection). Loosely typed: 'type' is the relationship label; fkColumn/targetIdProp wire the join. additionalProperties allowed for forward-compat.

allOf._comment: Machine-protocol sources (opcua, mtconnect) MUST declare where the machine stands — the UNS subject is built from it. Every green opcua/mtconnect source already does; a new one without a location would land on a default/empty subject just as silently as sgm-006 landed on a mis-spelled one. rest/postgresql/static/etc. sources legitimately have no location and are NOT forced.
